headline: Is Ford Stock A New Engine For Your Portfolio?
summary: The automaker's recent run is tempting, but its real value lies in how it moves differently from the market you already own.

headline: Lucid Group (LCID) Moves 28.8% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Lucid Group (LCID) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
